/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/bin/clang++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,liblocation_basic_src.so -o liblocation_basic_src.so CMakeFiles/location_basic_src.dir/src/src/Location_.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib/mdc_vector  -L/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib/mdc/base-plat  -L/media/sf_zz/tmp/ap_adsfi/workspace/meta_model/location_model/location_basic_src/../../../third_party/glog-0.6.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib/mdc_vector:/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib/mdc/base-plat:/media/sf_zz/tmp/ap_adsfi/workspace/meta_model/location_model/location_basic_src/../../../third_party/glog-0.6.0/lib: -lpthread -ldl -lglog -lyaml -lyaml-cpp
